title: Signal Garden
prompt: Create a 34 second luminous organic synth-pop rhythm track for a browser game called Signal Garden. The intro should feel like seedlings waking up, the middle should bloom with crisp percussion and airy chords, and the drop should feel like a radiant greenhouse opening. Clear beat accents, emotional but playable.
story: A dormant greenhouse on an orbital station only reactivates if the player grows beat-flowers in phase with the song.

title: Drop Architect
prompt: Create a 34 second precision electronic construction anthem for a rhythm game called Drop Architect. Minimal tense intro, mechanical lift with sharper percussion, then a confident geometric drop for synchronized building. Punchy transient beats, bright synth stabs, no vocals.
story: A city in the clouds must be assembled section by section before the chorus storm arrives.

title: Neon Pulse Corridor
prompt: Create a 34 second futuristic chase track for a three-dimensional browser rhythm runner. Fast neon tunnel mood, clear kick and snare pattern, strong lane-friendly beat markers, with a bright cinematic drop and a final sprint section. Instrumental only.
story: A courier races through a collapsing signal corridor before the city loses its last clean transmission route.

title: Orbital Aegis
prompt: Create a 34 second heroic synth defense track for a rhythm action game called Orbital Aegis. Start with tense surveillance pulses, rise into disciplined drum pressure, and deliver a dramatic shimmering drop with precise parry moments. Strong impact beats, no vocals.
story: A guardian core in orbit can only survive if its defense ring parries incoming bloom-shards in exact musical phase.

title: Wave Signal Surf
prompt: Create a 34 second fluid electronic surf track for an interactive voxel wavefield game. The intro should shimmer, the lift should feel like rising tides, and the drop should become a fast luminous current with clean beat anchors. Instrumental, highly rhythmic.
story: The player rides a signal ocean and must catch relay points across a living wavegrid before the current folds.

title: Chorus Circuit
prompt: Create a 34 second sleek electro anthem for a node-capture rhythm game called Chorus Circuit. The track should feel tactical and futuristic, with stable intro pulses, rising section momentum, and a triumphant drop. Clear beat accents suitable for spatial capture gameplay.
story: A broken music grid wakes up node by node as the player reconnects a ruined chorus network.

title: Bassline Breaker
prompt: Create a 34 second bass-heavy arcade breakbeat track for an impact-driven rhythm game called Bassline Breaker. Heavy low end, punchy drums, aggressive but clean transient hits, with a hard drop and satisfying impact spaces. Instrumental only.
story: A subterranean reactor is clogged with resonance blocks and only rhythmic impacts can shatter them safely.

title: Lore Frequency
prompt: Create a 34 second mysterious melodic electronic track for a narrative rhythm game called Lore Frequency. Start with cryptic pulses, develop into emotional harmonic motion, and reveal a luminous story drop. Clear beat anchors, cinematic but playable.
story: An archive buried under static reveals its history only when the player tunes fragments of memory into rhythm.

title: Sync Mirage
prompt: Create a 34 second illusion-themed synth rhythm track for a mirror reflex game called Sync Mirage. The intro should feel deceptive, the lift should alternate left-right energy, and the drop should become a glossy high-speed mirage. Strong stereo-feeling rhythm cues, no vocals.
story: A hall of mirrored echoes keeps duplicating the player’s motion, and only precise sync decisions reveal the true path.

title: Last Chorus Escape
prompt: Create a 34 second finale-ready electronic escape track for a browser rhythm game called Last Chorus Escape. Begin with urgency, escalate through a tightening middle section, and explode into a big emotional final chorus drop with clear beat markers for evasive play.
story: A collapsing theater of sound is going dark, and the player has one last chorus to escape with the song intact.
